conversation_summary: Created PRD for indigo e2e-perf project — 6 stories to optimize Electron e2e test execution time by replacing hardcoded sleeps with event-driven waits, reusing Electron instances, optimizing build pipeline, and reducing timeouts. User explicitly excluded parallelization and unit test extraction. Quality gates: typecheck+lint then full e2e run. Branch: feature/e2e-perf.

metadata.title: PRD: indigo e2e-perf — reduce Electron test execution time

next_steps: Start new session and run /run-project e2e-perf to execute all 6 stories
Or /execute-task e2e-perf/US-001 to start with the highest-impact change
